name: bloomsline-app
description: Bloomsline patient app — Expo web build served as a static SPA

NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION.description: MUST be false — the build tools (expo/metro) are devDependencies and have to install during the build. The buildpack prunes them from the runtime slug afterwards.

EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL.description: Care backend base URL, baked into the web build. If set on the app it OVERRIDES .env.production (dotenv never overwrites an existing process.env), so keep the two in sync or leave it unset.
